name: Willis Blackwell
bio: Willis Blackwell serves as the Shelby County Sheriff, leading law enforcement operations from the county seat of Center. Sheriff Blackwell oversees a department dedicated to protecting Shelby County through proactive policing and strong community partnerships.
campaignPromises: Combat drug trafficking through Shelby County
Enhance patrol operations along the Louisiana border
Improve detention facility programs for inmate rehabilitation
Recruit and retain quality deputies with competitive pay
Strengthen relationships with all communities in Shelby County
